title: Monorepo + pnpm + TS/ESM + static-site toolchain + CI (build/test/lint) skeleton
context: Financial-Literacy-Open is an openly-licensed, plain-language curriculum and privacy-preserving toolkit (TypeScript + ESM, pnpm workspaces, static-site generator). Before any content or tooling tasks can run, the repository needs a working monorepo scaffold: pnpm workspace, TS/ESM build, a static-site generator (e.g., Astro), and a CI pipeline (build, test, lint). This is the infrastructure foundation that all subsequent tasks depend on. There is no delivery partner or credentialed reviewer yet secured.
objective: Initialize the pnpm monorepo with TS/ESM configuration, a static-site generator skeleton, and a CI pipeline (GitHub Actions) that runs build, test, and lint to a green state — establishing the engineering foundation for all subsequent tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm workspace is configured with packages for policy/, schema/, content/, tools/, site/, and scripts/
TypeScript + ESM build configuration is present and `pnpm build` succeeds with no errors
A static-site generator (e.g., Astro or equivalent) skeleton renders a placeholder home page
`pnpm test` and `pnpm lint` pass on the skeleton (even with no substantive tests yet)
GitHub Actions CI workflow runs on push/PR and all steps pass (build, test, lint)
No secrets, tokens, or PII are committed; dependency scanning is included in CI
MIT license file present for code; CC-BY-4.0 notice placeholder present for content
output: A merged PR adding the pnpm monorepo scaffold, TS/ESM + static-site toolchain, and green CI pipeline — the engineering foundation for all M0+ tasks.
